caption:
新学期开始啦！欢迎来到 MMU Buddhist Society 的 Club & Society Registration Week (CSRW)。

🗓Date: 6–8 April 2026
⏰️Time: 10am–6pm
📍Vanue: Central Plaza

欢迎来认识我们，了解佛学会平时的活动，也可以和我们轻松交流。期待你的到来！😁

在忙碌的生活中，给自己一个暂停的机会💆。
欢迎加入我们的佛法分享会，在宁静的氛围中，一起探索佛法智慧，并思考如何将其运用在日常生活中。🧠💫
透过分享与交流，帮助你获得内在的平静，提升觉察力，也让心更加安定与清明🪷
📅 日期：2026年4月22日
⏰ 时间：晚上7:45 – 10:00
📍 地点：FAIE CLBR1023

报名链接🔗：https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd7ORvongE9RJ_0_8TjONaxjJdDdlkS2uh2NVVPBQtHtaHs9A/viewform?usp=dialog

我们不见不散✨

Take a moment to pause from your busy life 💆
Join us for a Dharma Sharing Session, where we explore Buddhist teachings in a calm and peaceful environment, and reflect on how they can be applied in our daily lives. 🧠💫

Through sharing and discussion, gain inner peace, build awareness, and cultivate a more grounded and clear state of mind.🪷

📅 Date: 22 April 2026
⏰ Time: 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR1023

Registration link🔗：https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd7ORvongE9RJ_0_8TjONaxjJdDdlkS2uh2NVVPBQtHtaHs9A/viewform?usp=dialog

See you there ✨

在忙碌的生活中，给自己一个轻松又有趣的暂停🎮。 

欢迎加入我们的佛法分享会，我们将通过互动游戏的方式，一起轻松探索佛法的智慧✨ 
在欢笑与参与中，理解佛教的核心理念，并思考如何把它运用在日常生活中。 😆

透过游戏与交流，不仅能让大家更容易领悟佛法，也帮助放松心情☀️
📅 日期：2026年4月29日 
⏰ 时间：晚上7:45 – 10:00 
📍 地点：FAIE CLBR1023 

一起来边玩边学，我们不见不散✨
🔗： https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScZ9eeXdLGvvktAKQHBQZQ1OwGa-wL-2ShpkrSzEf4K2MZf1Q/viewform?usp=publish-editor

Take a fun and refreshing pause from your busy life 🎮 

Join our Dharma Sharing Session, where we’ll explore Buddhist wisdom through interactive games ✨ 
Learn the core teachings of Buddhism in a relaxed and engaging way, and reflect on how to apply them in your daily life 😆 

Through games and sharing, you’ll not only gain a deeper understanding of the Dharma, but also unwind and relax ☀️ 

📅 Date: 29 April 2026 
⏰ Time: 7:45 PM – 10:00 PM 
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR1023 

Come learn while having fun — see you there ✨ 
🔗: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScZ9eeXdLGvvktAKQHBQZQ1OwGa-wL-2ShpkrSzEf4K2MZf1Q/viewform?usp=publish-editor

[Chinese New Year Gathering 2026] 🏮🐎

A big thank you to everyone who joined our Chinese New Year celebration and made it such a warm and lively event! 🧧✨Buddhist Society Club sincerely wishes you joy, prosperity, and good health in the year ahead.🎆

The interactive games filled the venue with laughter and excitement! Write Spring Festival couplets, Lou Sang, handmade lantern activity, sharing blessings and welcoming the new year with full hearts. 🥳🧨

We look forward to welcoming you again at our future events, and we will continue to improve and make each gathering even better! 🌟

🧧 Hello 新年好～ ₍⑅ᐢ..ᐢ₎ ✨
不知不觉2026新年要到啦～是时候一起热闹一下啦！🎉

今年佛学会诚意邀请你来参加我们的 新春聚会，
让我们一起 捞生讨个好彩头、写春联、玩小游戏拿红包

不只是过年，
更是和朋友一起相聚的温暖的时刻 🤍
希望在欢笑中，感受新年的气氛，
一起迎接一个充满祝福与喜悦的新一年 🐴😊

📅 日期：21 January 2026
⏰ 时间：8:00pm – 10:00pm
📍 地点：FAIE CLBR 1023
📝 报名链接：
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSctvwihyAJ8-SY1IPJjTSmpkbbuHKmcBCapGIG4ymi657zXzA/viewform?usp=dialog

🧧 没有收费
记得带上你的朋友和好心情，
让我们一起 捞生、玩乐、迎新年 🧨🧧
让我们在校园一起留下美好的新年回忆～🥰

🧧 Hello and Happy New Year! ₍⑅ᐢ..ᐢ₎ ✨
2026 is just around the corner ， it’s time to celebrate together! 🎉

This year, the Buddhist Society warmly invites you to our Chinese New Year Gathering,
where we’ll Lo Hei for good luck, write Spring Couplets, play fun games, and even win some red packets 🧧😆

It’s not just about celebrating the new year,
but also about spending warm moments with friends 🤍
Let’s soak in the festive vibes, share laughter,
and welcome a brand new year filled with blessings and joy 🐴😊

📅 Date: 21 January 2026
⏰ Time: 8:00 PM – 10:00 PM
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR 1023
📝 Register here:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSctvwihyAJ8-SY1IPJjTSmpkbbuHKmcBCapGIG4ymi657zXzA/viewform?usp=dialog

🧧 Free of charge!
Bring your friends and your good vibes,
let’s Lo Hei, have fun, and welcome the New Year together 🧨🧧
Can’t wait to create beautiful New Year memories with you on campus! 🥰

［Winter Solstice Celebration 2025 and AGM 2025］🔖🍡

Thank you everyone for joining our Winter Solstice celebration and AGM .✨😁We truly appreciate your presence and support.🫣🤝It made the event so much more meaningful.👯❤️

We hope you enjoyed the activities and moments.🥰Your participation means a lot to us!👐

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused during the event and thank you for your understanding 🙏😽🫶🏻 See you next event‼️❣️

✨一学期一次的 Orientation Day 来啦‼️
欢迎参加 MMU Buddhist Society 的迎新活动，当天会有轻松的小游戏、简单茶点，以及认识新朋友的机会，让你在愉快的氛围中了解佛学会的活动与日常。期待与你见面！👭❤️‍🔥

⏰ Time: 7:30pm – 10:00pm
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR1023
我们不见不散！🫵🏻🤩

✨ Orientation Day is here once a semester‼️
You are warmly invited to join the MMU Buddhist Society’s Orientation Day. There will be mini games, simple refreshments, and a great opportunity to meet new friends. In a relaxed and welcoming environment, you’ll also get to know more about the society’s activities and daily events. We look forward to seeing you! 👭❤️‍🔥

📅 Date: 15 April 2026
⏰ Time: 7:30pm – 10:00pm
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR1023
See you there! 🫵🏻🤩

Good Day Fellow Friends!🤩

It's time to know about us!🫶🏻

#mmubuddhistsocietycyberjaya

[March Orientation Day 2026]✨

Thank you to everyone who showed up and made our Orientation Day so lively and unforgettable! 💛

From meeting new friends to sharing laughs and good vibes, it was such a great start to the journey ahead 🌿

We hope you had as much fun as we did! This is only the beginning! Stay tuned for more exciting events coming your way 👀🔥

Hope to see you again! 🫶

［FATEFUL MEMORY CAMP DAY2 and DAY3☺️🎉］
A big thank you to everyone who participated in our camp!🫣🥳❤️

We hope you enjoyed every moment and had lots of fun with us 🎉✌🏻

If there were any imperfections along the way, thank you for your patience and understanding.🙏🏻See you again next time 😽🫶🏻

[October Orientation Day 2025]🌟

A huge thank you to everyone who joined us for our Orientation Day! 🥰

It was truly wonderful meeting so many new faces, sharing laughter and creating memorable moments together ~❤️‍🔥🗯️

This is just the beginning, more exciting activities are on the way. We can’t wait to see you again at our next event!!!🤩💫

🌟 想来一场意义非凡又超有趣的度假之旅吗？
加入我们的 缘忆生活营，体验一段充满友谊、喜悦和反思的难忘旅程！🧘‍♀️✨

原价：每人 RM25
现在即可获得 套餐：买4送1🎉
 五人总共 RM100 — 每人仅需 RM20！💥

包含哪些内容？
✅ 结识新朋友，建立长久的联系
✅ 畅玩刺激有趣的游戏，让你开怀大笑
✅ 有机会赢取丰厚奖品
✅ 轻松愉快地学习和探索佛教价值观
✅ 全包餐饮、住宿和交通*🚌🍛🛏️

无论您来此是为了娱乐、友谊，还是一次有意义的冒险《缘•忆》都能满足您的需求！🧡

🗓️ 日期：2025年10月31日 至 11月2日
📍 地点：BMSM Samadhi Vihara

📌 名额有限！召集您的朋友 立即报名！
扫描二维码或直接给我们留言。
让我们一起创造难忘的回忆！🎈

🌟 Looking for a meaningful yet super fun getaway?
Join our Buddhist Camp - 缘忆生活营 Bundle Set and experience an unforgettable journey of friendship, joy, and reflection! 🧘‍♀️✨ 

Original price: RM25 per person
Now get a Bundle Set — Buy 4, FREE 1 🎉 
That’s RM100 for 5 people — only RM20 each! 💥 

What’s included? 
✅ Meet new friends@and build lasting connections 
✅ Play fun & exciting games that will make you laugh out loud 
✅ Stand a chance to win awesome prizes
✅ Learn and explore Buddhist values in a light and engaging way 
✅ Meals, accommodation, and transportation are ALL included 🚌🍛🛏️ 

Whether you’re here for fun, friendship, or a meaningful escape — this camp has it all! 🧡 

🗓️ Date: 31 October - 2 November 2025
📍 Venue: BMSM Samadhi Vihara

📌 Limited slots only! Gather your friends and register now! 
Scan the QR code or message us directly. 
Let’s make unforgettable memories at this came together! 🎈

【佛学生活营回忆录】⛺️💦🤩
三天两夜的缘份，一眨眼就收进了回忆里啦！💭🩷

欢笑声、游戏、夜谈，大家一起的记忆统统都让我们在这个视频里回忆起来吧！💕👀👣谢谢每一位营员愿意敞开心、跟我们大家一起玩！🫣🥳

佛学生活营圆满结束，但我们的故事才刚刚开始。
一起回顾最温暖的瞬间吧。❤️

#mmu #mmucyberjaya #buddhistsocietyclubmmu #buddhism #buddhistsociety #camp

越喜欢跑越远？
结果我们一路跑到——佛学生活营！🏃‍♂️💨
这次不只是跑，更是「找回自己」的旅程💛

📍 地点：BMSM Bodhi Park
📅 日期：10月31日 至 11月2日
🚌 包含：双程来回交通 MMU ↔️ Bodhi Park

赶快jio你身边的亲朋好友来我们的缘忆佛学营！一起放下烦恼，玩到嗨！🥳🤩

🚐✨靓仔靓妹们，我们真的来接你咯～

三天两夜的佛学生活营，就要在10月31日开跑啦！🔥
这里不只有游戏、美食，还有一群超好玩的新朋友等你遇见 💬💛
最爽的是——营费只要RM25？！😱
吃住往返交通全包，回忆全满 🎒

快上车，我们在【缘忆佛学生活营】等你一起出发～💨我们Bodhi Park见！🫣
🔗：https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfk-vOJLsga8yOKwqURJ-U1pWjGetWF0VmdIMVsNchmqwOxvg/viewform?usp=header

✨【缘忆生活营——— 场地介绍】✨
想知道我们的营地有多棒吗？😍
冷气吹到爽爽 ❄️、Lift直接上去 🚪、还贴心准备Tilam 🛏️～

最重要的是 👉 超！大！空！间！🔥 玩游戏完全不怕拘束～

最重要的是 👉 这里是结交新朋友的最佳地方 👫💬一起笑、一起玩、一起创造难忘的回忆 ✨

来就对了！🤩 场地这么好玩，保证让你留下满满回忆 💫

✨【缘忆 Camp】✨ 
Curious how awesome our camp venue is? 😍 
Enjoy the comfort of full air-conditioning ❄️, direct lift access 🚪, and even comfy tilams prepared just for you! 🛏️ 

Most importantly 👉 a super spacious hall! 🔥 So you can enjoy all the games without feeling cramped at all! 

And of course 👉 it’s the perfect place to make new friends 👫💬 Laugh together, play together, and create unforgettable memories ✨ 

You won’t regret coming! 🤩 With such a fun and cozy venue, you‘ll be bringing home memories to last a lifetime 💫

#mmucyberjaya #mmu #mmucyberbuddhistsociety

一年一度的冬至又到啦！
是不是开始想念家里热腾腾的汤圆？
想念妈妈煮汤圆时的味道？😭💗
没关系！今年冬至，让我们一起把“家的温度”找回来！

✨ 佛学会冬至小聚会温馨登场
📅 日期：3/12/2025（星期三）
⏰ 时间：8:00pm – 10:00pm（7:30pm 开始登记）
📍 地点：FAIE CLBR 1023

不只吃，还要——
👉 现场搓汤圆！
亲手捏、亲手煮、亲手吃，
那种“这是我做的！”的满足感，绝对让你暖到心里～😋🤤

最重要的是……
💰 全程免费！
🥰 只需带上朋友 & 好心情就好！

📌 报名链接：
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeP6Cv3uW4DZftAKMeR-Q73915r3leFJRdeKhy-nrSBTSON3A/viewform

心动不如行动，赶快报名吧！
我们在冬至的夜里，等你一起团团圆圆～🤍✨

The Winter Solstice is here again!
Are you starting to miss the warm, comforting tangyuan from home?
Missing the taste of your mom’s homemade tangyuan? 😭💗
Don’t worry! This year, let’s rediscover the warmth of “home” together!

✨ Our Winter Solstice Gathering is happening soon
📅 Date: 3/12/2025 (Wednesday)
⏰ Time: 8:00pm – 10:00pm (Registration starts at 7:30pm)
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR 1023

Not only will we eat, but we will also—
👉 Make tangyuan on the spot!
You’ll roll it yourself, cook it yourself, and enjoy the taste of your own creation.
That satisfying feeling of “I made this!” will surely warm your heart. 😋🤤

And the best part…
💰 It’s completely free!
🥰 Just bring your friends and good vibes!

📌 Registration Link:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeP6Cv3uW4DZftAKMeR-Q73915r3leFJRdeKhy-nrSBTSON3A/viewform

Don’t hesitate—sign up now!
We look forward to spending a warm and meaningful Winter Solstice night with you. 🤍✨

#mmubuddhistsociety #mmucyberjaya

#mmu #mmucyberjaya #mmubuddhistsocietycyberjaya

🌟 [Dharma Game 1.0] 🌟

In August, Buddhist Society Cyberjaya held our very first Dharma Game 1.0🎉 which is a fun and interactive way to learn about the life of the Buddha🙏✨

Through the game, members explored the important stages of Buddha’s journey 🪷, from his birth, renunciation, enlightenment, to his teachings that continue to inspire us today 💡🌿

💖 A big thank you to everyone who joined and brought so much energy to the session! Your presence made the learning experience truly meaningful 🫶

Stay tuned for more engaging and inspiring activities from Buddhist Society Cyberjaya! 🌈✨

［佛REAL 佛FUN 2.0]🥳
你以为佛教只有念经打坐？ 
不不不，这次我们来点不一样的！🎉 

游戏 ✨ 笑声 ✨ 尖叫 ✨ 
在轻松又刺激的活动中，

Have you ever felt lost or tired in the busyness of daily life,
wanting to slow down but not knowing where to begin?🤔

What if Buddhism is not only ancient wisdom found in scriptures,
but something we can truly apply in everyday life?🌿

Join us for a meaningful Dharma Sharing session,
where we explore how Buddhist teachings relate to our daily experiences.
Together, we reflect, contemplate, and learn how to bring awareness and calm into everyday life.✨✨

📅 Date: 14 January 2026 (Wednesday)
⏰ Time: 8:00 p.m. – 10:00 p.m.
📍 Venue: FAIE CLBR 1023
📝 Register here:
https://forms.gle/tLqdRfaV8FNRxkxt9
💰 Free of charge! No prior knowledge needed. Everyone is welcome.

[Upcoming Event ]🌟

We've prepared a series of exciting events for everyone. Whether you're looking to learn about Buddhism in a relaxed atmosphere, make new friends, 👭or travel together to strengthen your relationships, you'll find happiness here! 💛💕

🌟 First, we'll have "佛FUN，佛REAL🔉" a unique Dharma Talk! We'll make the Dharma fun and engaging. 😎 Not only will we listen, but we'll also have interactive games, allowing you to experience wisdom through laughter.🎮 🔥

🌿 Next up is "缘来你也忆起🪷" our Dharma Study Camp. Not only will there be activities and networking opportunities, but you'll also have the opportunity to calm your mind and rediscover the warmth and connection between people. ⚖️

🤝 Finally, there's the much-anticipated Bonding Trip! 🎒Let's enjoy time together, travel together, experience joy, create stories, and most importantly, draw closer together.🌟🌟

 Whether you're looking for learning, growth, friendship, and laughter, don't miss these events. 👭🧑‍🤝‍🧑Let's look forward to it and join in! 🎉

𝗗𝗵𝗮𝗺𝗺𝗮 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴: 𝗔 𝗧𝗵𝗼𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗯𝗹𝗲𝗺𝘀 – 𝗢𝗻𝗲 𝗦𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 《万题一解》💡

On 21st May 2025, the MMU Buddhist Society had the honour of hosting Venerable Nyaninda for our BS Confession: Dhamma Sharing.✨🙏

In this sharing session, Venerable guided us to deeply reflect on the nature of thoughts💭 — ❓how they arise, how they affect our minds, and how we can become aware of and observe them through the wisdom of the Dhamma.🧐

Thank you to every participant for attending. 💛

Let us continue to practice the Dhamma in daily life by observing our thoughts, 
so that we can keep our minds from being carried away by the ups and downs of life.🪷

［ MMU Buddhist Society Bonding Trip 💫］

This 2day1night  bonding trip brought our committee members closer together, allowing us to get to know each other better and strengthen our team's bonds . 🔒🔥❤️Through laughter and conversation, we not only forged friendships but also strengthened the future of the Buddhist Society. ☀️🏃🏻‍♀️

We also ventured into nature, visited farms 🌿, and sampled Bentong's local delicacies 🍜🥢, experiencing the connection and warmth between people and the land.⛰️⛰️

A special thank you to @fayfarmraub for his warm invitation to his farm, making this trip even more fulfilling and memorable ✨💕.

Dharma 2：《From university to community: living the dhamma 🧘

This Dharma sharing session invites you to explore the transition from being a student practitioner to applying the Dhamma in the wider world.🧑‍🎓🕵️

We can share the inspiring stories together ! 😆From the first time we came into contact with Buddhism,🙌 to the memories of being active in the Buddhist society in university, 🎒and how to continue to let Buddhism accompany with our life journey after work.🖥️⌨️

你是否曾有遗憾，久久无法释怀？🌱
后悔没说出口的那句话，
走错的学业道路，
还是未曾道别的那个人？

On 12th January 2025, we have a collaboration with BMSM Putrajaya to held a Metta Camp with Bhante Mahinda. 🙏🏻 The camp was a wonderful opportunity for everyone to learn the true meaning of metta (loving-kindness) and gain valuable Buddhist knowledge.👐🏻🪷
